extraction_metadata.agent: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 Entity Extraction Agent
extraction_metadata.cycle_assessment: LOW-YIELD CYCLE — alternate-outlet corroboration only; 0 genuinely new stories; 1 new candidate confirmation (G Manivanan / DUN Jeram Padang) via Sinar body text

entities.context: NEW CONFIRMATION — PH candidate DUN Jeram Padang. Sinar articles explicitly name 'G Manivanan' as 'calon Pakatan Harapan (PH) DUN Jeram Padang' in article body text. Previously appeared only as photo caption in night3 Sinar manifesto articles ('Fahmi (kiri) dan Manivanan (dua kiri) ketika menyantuni sebuah keluarga di Felda Palong 2'). Campaign event: Fahmi Fadzil + Manivanan at Felda Palong 2 (Jempol district), Monday 20 Jul — 'Program Ziarah Kasih'. Jeram Padang: 4-cornered fight (PH-Manivanan / BN / Bersatu-solo / ASLI-Dayana Yusof).

NEW — 4-cornered fight: PH (G Manivanan) vs BN vs Bersatu (solo logo) vs ASLI (Dayana Yusof). Jempol district; Felda Palong 2 settlement area. Fahmi Fadzil campaigned here with Manivanan at 'Program Ziarah Kasih' on Monday 20 Jul. Connects to FELDA development manifesto pledge. Candidate name now fully confirmed via Sinar body text (was photo-caption-only in prior cycle).

ALTERNATE-OUTLET CORROBORATION — Sinar Harian covers same Fahmi-KJ exchange as dawn FMT articles. Sinar adds: KJ 'sudah agak lama meninggalkan parti' (left Umno for quite some time) and 'mahu memulakan semula asas politiknya' (wants to rebuild political base). Fahmi's Malay-Muslim PH leader list confirmed: Anwar, Mohamad Sabu, Dzulkefly Ahmad, Amirudin Shari, Aminuddin Harun. Sinar article also names G Manivanan as PH DUN Jeram Padang candidate in body text. Cross-outlet corroboration: FMT (EN+BM) + Sinar now 3 outlets confirming Fahmi-KJ exchange.

ALTERNATE-OUTLET CORROBORATION — Sinar uses explicit 'isyarat' (signal) framing for KJ's BN-PN cooperation rationale. KJ: BN chose to cooperate with PN as 'isyarat kepada PH' re: Malay sensitivities. Sinar adds context: some Umno members feel federal govt 'kurang peka terhadap sensitiviti orang Melayu.' KJ's 'Ada sesuatu yang tak kena dalam Kerajaan Perpaduan' (something wrong in Unity Govt) quote surfaced in Sinar related-articles section. 4th outlet (FMT EN+BM, Sinar) now corroborating KJ 'signal' narrative.

ALTERNATE-OUTLET CORROBORATION — Sinar covers same Anwar discipline clarification: PM issued no resignation order, only reminded all officeholders to maintain unity spirit, discipline, professionalism during PRN campaign. Sinar confirms: democratic differences allowed (parties contested separately in prior PRNs). Investor perception cited. Mohamad Hasan ready to resign if ordered; Khaled Nordin 'no need to wait.' Cross-outlet: FMT (EN+BM) + Sinar = 3 outlets.

ALTERNATE-OUTLET CORROBORATION — Utusan covers same MCMC 3R enforcement story as dawn HarianMetro. Confirms: MCMC + PDRM investigating 3R content targeting Tuanku Muhriz; individual recorded under Section 233 CMA 1998; MCMC warns all parties avoid 3R during campaign period. Utusan adds: individual called to IPD Seremban for statement recording. Cross-outlet: HarianMetro + Utusan = 2 outlets. Author: Fatin Norizati Mat Isa.

entities.entity: DAP ketandusan idea (Akmal Saleh claim — Sinar related-link surfacing)
entities.context: SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION — Sinar related-articles section surfaces headline: 'DAP ketandusan idea, bawa penipuan baharu pada PRN Negeri Sembilan - Akmal Saleh.' Umno Youth chief Akmal Saleh claims DAP has run out of ideas and is bringing 'new lies' to PRN NS. PIR-16 narrative: BN/Umno counter-attack on DAP. Full article not scraped this cycle — flagged for next-cycle extraction if content surfaces.

entities.entity: DUN Chuah candidate selection dispute (Sinar related-link surfacing)
entities.context: SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION — Sinar related-articles section: 'PH nafi dakwaan tak puas hati pemilihan calon DUN Chuah.' PH denies dissatisfaction over DUN Chuah candidate selection. Suggests internal PH friction over candidate picking for DUN Chuah. Full article not scraped — flagged for next-cycle monitoring.

entities.entity: Aminuddin 'kekal di Sikamat' sentiment (Sinar related-link surfacing)
entities.context: SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION — Sinar related-articles section: 'Aminuddin disenangi, ramai masih harap beliau kekal di Sikamat.' Public sentiment that many still hope Aminuddin stays at Sikamat (his former seat, N.13, now vacated for Linggi challenge). Reinforces PIR-07 'fleeing Sikamat' context — Aminuddin's move from Sikamat to Linggi may be unpopular with local base. Full article not scraped — flagged for monitoring.

SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION — MalayMail related-articles section: 'EC dispatches 13,263 postal ballots for Negeri Sembilan state polls.' Election Commission logistical milestone for PRN NS. Early voting 28 Jul, polling 1 Aug. Full article not scraped — election logistics data point.

entities.entity: Fathi Aris (PH-UMNO/BN commentary — Sinar related-link surfacing)
entities.context: SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION — Sinar related-articles section: 'PH tak punya hak untuk berasa tertipu dengan UMNO, BN - Fathi Aris.' Commentator Fathi Aris argues PH has no right to feel betrayed by UMNO/BN. PIR-16 narrative: pro-BN commentary framing coalition dynamics. Full article not scraped.

G Manivanan / DUN Jeram Padang (NEW).notes: PH candidate for DUN Jeram Padang now fully confirmed via Sinar body text. Was photo-caption-only in prior cycle. 4-cornered fight: PH / BN / Bersatu-solo / ASLI. Campaign event at Felda Palong 2 with Fahmi.
